Package neqsim.physicalproperties.interfaceproperties.solidadsorption

Interface AdsorptionInterface

All Superinterfaces:
Serializable, ThermodynamicConstantsInterface
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractAdsorptionModel, BETAdsorption, FreundlichAdsorption, LangmuirAdsorption, PotentialTheoryAdsorption, SipsAdsorption
public interface AdsorptionInterface extends ThermodynamicConstantsInterface, Serializable
Interface for adsorption isotherm models.

Defines the contract for all gas-solid adsorption calculations in NeqSim, including surface excess computation, solid material selection, and model identification.

Version:
2.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from interface neqsim.thermo.ThermodynamicConstantsInterface

    atm, avagadroNumber, boltzmannConstant, electronCharge, faradayConstant, gravity, molarMassAir, normalStateTemperature, pi, planckConstant, R, referencePressure, referenceTemperature, standardStateTemperature, vacumPermittivity

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    calcAdsorption(int phaseNum)
    Calculate adsorption for the specified phase.
    IsothermType
    getIsothermType()
    Get the isotherm model type used by this implementation.
    double

    Get the surface excess (amount adsorbed) for a component by index.
    double

    Get the surface excess (amount adsorbed) for a component by name.
    double
    getTotalSurfaceExcess()
    Get the total surface excess of all components combined.
    boolean
    isCalculated()
    Check whether adsorption has been calculated.
    void
    setSolidMaterial(String solidM)
    Set the solid adsorbent material.

  • Method Details

    • calcAdsorption

      void calcAdsorption(int phaseNum)
      Calculate adsorption for the specified phase.
      Parameters:
      phaseNum - the phase number (0-based)

    • getSurfaceExcess

      double getSurfaceExcess(int component)
      Get the surface excess (amount adsorbed) for a component by index.
      Parameters:
      component - the component index (0-based)
      Returns:
      surface excess in mol/kg adsorbent

    • getSurfaceExcess

      double getSurfaceExcess(String componentName)
      Get the surface excess (amount adsorbed) for a component by name.
      Parameters:
      componentName - the component name
      Returns:
      surface excess in mol/kg adsorbent

    • setSolidMaterial

      void setSolidMaterial(String solidM)
      Set the solid adsorbent material.
      Parameters:
      solidM - the solid material identifier (e.g. "AC", "Zeolite 13X", "Silica Gel")

    • getTotalSurfaceExcess

      double getTotalSurfaceExcess()
      Get the total surface excess of all components combined.
      Returns:
      total surface excess in mol/kg adsorbent

    • getIsothermType

      IsothermType getIsothermType()
      Get the isotherm model type used by this implementation.
      Returns:
      the isotherm type enum value

    • isCalculated

      boolean isCalculated()
      Check whether adsorption has been calculated.
      Returns:
      true if calcAdsorption has been called successfully
